{{Infobox group
| name = Imperialists
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

''See also: [[Imperialists Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Imperialists are an alliance of various [[Guilds]] characterized by their desire to restore the throne following the death of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]. This group is composed of the [[Magisters]], the [[Blackwatch]], the [[Imperial Guard]], and the [[Navigators]]. They are often contrasted with the [[Independents]], a separate faction of [[Guilds]]. The Imperialists have been blamed in news reports for widespread instability, including food shortages and violence, and have faced accusations regarding the circumstances of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s passing. In an effort to maintain order and preserve the [[Empire]], the Imperialists have worked to install a new leader. This movement has included figures such as an [[Imperial Steward]], [[Calder Marten]], and has utilized the [[Champions]]—one of the oldest [[Guilds]] in the [[Empire]]—to provide security alongside the [[Imperial Guard]]. While some view their actions as a pursuit of imperial unity and a defense against [[Elder]] influence, others criticize them for attempting to install an imitation ruler. The group's activities, including gathering forces near the [[Capital]], have drawn significant attention and opposition from rival factions.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Greenwardens]] claim [[Imperialists]] drove them out of town.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperialists]] are an alliance consisting of the [[Magisters]], the [[Blackwatch]], the [[Imperial Guard]], and the [[Navigators]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Imperialists]] are a group that cannot keep an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]] on the throne if he is under threat of [[Elder]] possession.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperialists]] are drawing up their forces surrounding the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Imperialists]] want to keep [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] on the throne.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Imperialists]] are attempting to raise a fake [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Imperialists are a faction that maintains their own headquarters and participated in clearing out the room at the summit of the [[Rose Tower]]. As a group involved in peace meetings, they were also seen standing in opposition to [[Jorin]] and [[Nathanael Bareius]]. This faction includes [[Calder Marten]], and the group has been identified as a party that could be held responsible for the deaths of various [[Guild Heads]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperialists]] are a group involved in the current scenario.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperialists]] cleared out the room at the top of the [[Rose Tower]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperialists]] are a faction that could be blamed for killing [[Guild Heads]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Calder Marten]] was part of a group of [[Imperialists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Imperialists]] are a faction involved in peace meetings.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The headquarters belongs to the [[Imperialists]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Imperialists]] are standing opposite [[Jorin]] and [[Nathanael Bareius]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“...Greenwardens closed up their chapter house. I had an appointment, and now they’re telling me you Imperialists drove them out of town!”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
